actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour component id=1963046888 (m_Script guid=064216bc04beaca4fab9a6b5d9bca977) is the ToggleVisibility script attached to Canvas_Labels. It exposes a public, parameterless method Toggle() that flips Renderer.enabled on the same GameObject. Note: Canvas_Labels has no Rigidbody in the scene extract and no Collider/EventTrigger reported; ensure manual method invocation is permitted by the harness or confirm a Collider/EventTrigger exists. Also ensure a Renderer component exists on Canvas_Labels at runtime; otherwise calling Toggle() will result in a NullReferenceException (currentRenderer is null). Expected behavior when a Renderer exists: first call disables if initially enabled (or enables if disabled), second call restores the prior state.
